title: Environmental Co-Benefits
description: Bitcoin mining can use renewable energy well, can be a good demand response load, can recycle heat, can reduce methane emissions, and can use lost energy that would otherwise be wasted.

resources.title: Demand Response
resources.notes: Grid flexibility mechanics relevant to interruptible mining load.

resources.title: Waste Heat
resources.notes: Background on capturing and reusing rejected thermal energy.

resources.title: Methane Emissions
resources.notes: Context for flare mitigation and methane-to-power pathways.

resources.title: Curtailment (Electricity)
resources.notes: Background on energy that is produced but not consumed due to grid constraints.
